fields.title: Fix worker custom tool inventory for bundled subagent allowlists
fields.description: Bundled subagents now declare bd and Exa tools, but worker sessions only receive agent/apply_patch/submit_result as custom tools. Align worker session tool inventory with bundled agent allowlists or narrow the allowlists so spawned agents only request tools that actually exist.
fields.notes: Reproduced remaining worker inventory mismatch with mode agents: deep/smart/rush allowlists included memory, but createWorkerCustomTools did not register a memory tool. Extracted a reusable memory tool definition, added it to worker custom tools, and covered the regression in agent-tool-allowlist.test.ts.
fields.close_reason: Worker sessions now include the memory tool alongside bd/Exa/apply_patch so bundled mode-agent allowlists validate correctly.
